DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT FURTHER ORDERS WOULD BE INEFFECTUAL AS PLAINTIFF HAS DISREGARDED A PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT TO PRODUCE RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS AND FAILED TO APPEAR FOR A PROPERLY NOTICED DEPOSITION. THE REQUEST FOR FURTHER MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (610/BCHAN)
